title: olearia hectorii
intro: Olearia hectorii, also known as Karamu, is a flowering shrub native to New Zealand, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe and protect wounds. The health benefits of Olearia hectorii include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Olearia hectorii can be made into infusions, tinctures, or poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
